title: The Freshman

evidence.note: Published 1925; the 95-year US copyright term has expired for works published through 1930, so the film print is public domain in the US by term expiry.

watch.label: Internet Archive — The Freshman (1925), full film

editorial: The Freshman is a 1925 American silent comedy starring Harold Lloyd as an eager college newcomer, directed by Fred C. Newmeyer and Sam Taylor, and one of Lloyd's biggest box-office successes. Published in 1925, the film print's 95-year US copyright term has expired, so the photoplay is in the US public domain by term expiry. The score and later restorations are left undetermined.
